tiles.name: Use the filter in the top right to filter by environment
Markdown
tiles.markdown:
## DocApp

Note that only about 50% of DocApp journeys are successful. 
This is because people tend to give up on journeys when they are told to get a specific form of ID for DocApp verification

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
## Identity

Note that only about 70% of identity journeys are successful. This is because people tend to give up on journeys when they are told to get a form of ID to verify their identity.

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
## Auth only

These journeys are much simpler than other types of journey, which means the % of successful journeys should be close to 100%

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
## API Gateway requests
The graphs below show the number of requests to each orchestration endpoint. Note that since this is taken from API gateway metrics, it can include potentially invalid requests
